description: A full-width colored banner with a heading, description text, and a prominent call-to-action button. Used to drive user action such as job browsing or section exploration.

layout.structure: 2-column (text left, button right) or stacked on mobile
layout.alignment: Left-aligned text, right-aligned button on desktop

FR-01.title: Heading
FR-01.description: The banner MUST display a heading (H4).

FR-02.title: Description Text
FR-02.description: The banner SHOULD display a short description paragraph.

FR-03.title: CTA Button
FR-03.description: The banner MUST include a prominent CTA button/link.
acceptance: Button text with link to target page
Visually distinct from text (border, outline, or filled button style)
May open in same window or new window

FR-04.title: Background Color
FR-04.description: The banner MUST have a solid brand background color.

FR-05.title: Responsive Layout
FR-05.description: Banner MUST stack vertically on mobile.
acceptance: Mobile: Heading, text, and button stacked vertically

A.description: CTA banner with dark navy (#071D49) background and white text. Used for general CTAs like 'Explore opportunities'.

styling.buttonStyle: Outlined or text link with arrow

B.description: CTA banner with bright blue (#0066F5) background and white text. Used for job/career CTAs.

styling.buttonStyle: Outlined white button or text link

accessibility.AC-01: Banner text MUST meet WCAG AA contrast on colored background (white on navy = 14.4:1, white on blue = 4.7:1)
accessibility.AC-02: CTA button MUST be keyboard accessible
accessibility.AC-03: External links MUST indicate 'opens in a new window'
